en.tagline: AI powered career counselling for confident decisions.
en.name: Name
en.goal_placeholder: Example: I want a stable career where I can solve problems and keep learning.
en.no_assessments: No assessments yet. Complete one to see dashboard history.
en.hero_title: Find a career path that fits your strengths.
en.hero_text: Answer a short assessment and get career matches, skill gaps, and learning roadmaps.
en.career_domains_title: Career domains included in this MVP
en.no_careers_found: No careers found for this search.
en.assistant_empty: Complete an assessment to unlock personalized answers.
en.assistant_prompt: Ask me about your best match, skill gap, salary, future scope, or roadmap.
en.assistant_placeholder: Example: What skill should I learn first?
en.footer_pitch: Personalized career counselling with assessment, AI guidance, and career roadmaps.
en.about_intro: PathFinder-AI helps students understand their strengths, explore suitable career options, and build a practical learning roadmap using assessment, analysis, and AI-powered counselling.
en.offering_intro: Take a look at the services we provide.
en.personalized_assessments_text: Our platform starts by gathering crucial information about you, including your name, academic performance, and areas of interest. We then tailor assessment questions directly related to your indicated interests.
en.comprehensive_analysis_text: Our AI analyzes your responses, evaluates your strengths and development areas, and calculates a precise score that reflects your potential in different career domains.
en.customized_career_insights_text: Based on your assessment score, we provide career paths aligned with your strengths and interests, helping you make informed decisions about your future.
en.ai_powered_guidance_text: Use the AI-powered chatbot to ask questions about professions, roadmaps, skills, salary scope, and recommendations based on your unique profile.
en.industry_insights_text: Gain field-specific insights, mentoring direction, counselling support, and resources that help you understand what professionals actually do in your area of interest.
en.customized_tests_text: Our aptitude test is designed to suit your interests and academic profile.
en.personalized_guidance_text: Receive personalized career advice tailored to your strengths and goals.
en.ai_insights_text: Optimize career choices with precise AI insights and skill-gap analysis.
en.cta_text: Receive customized professional career recommendations tailored to your unique strengths and interests for optimal career growth.
en.contact_text: Reach out for career counselling, mentorship resources, project support, or platform questions.
en.message_placeholder: Tell us what career help you need
en.contact_notice: Thank you. Your message has been received for demo purposes.
en.optional_password: Leave blank to keep current password
en.products_title: Digital career resources for your next step.
en.products_text: Buy roadmap packs, resume templates, interview kits, and career clarity resources built for students.
en.demo_payment_note: This project version uses demo checkout and does not charge real money.
en.title: Title
en.question: Question

hi.tagline: AI se career counselling, confident decision ke liye.
hi.name: Naam
hi.goal_placeholder: Example: Main stable career chahta/chahti hoon jahan problem solving aur learning ho.
hi.no_assessments: Abhi koi assessment nahi hai. History dekhne ke liye assessment complete karein.
hi.hero_title: Apni strengths ke hisaab se career path dhundhein.
hi.hero_text: Short assessment complete karein aur career matches, skill gaps, aur learning roadmaps paayen.
hi.career_domains_title: Is MVP mein included career domains
hi.no_careers_found: Is search ke liye career nahi mila.
hi.assistant_empty: Personalized answers ke liye pehle assessment complete karein.
hi.assistant_prompt: Best match, skill gap, salary, future scope, ya roadmap ke baare mein poochhein.
hi.assistant_placeholder: Example: Mujhe pehle kaunsi skill seekhni chahiye?
hi.footer_pitch: Assessment, AI guidance, aur career roadmaps ke saath personalized career counselling.
hi.how_help: Hum Aapki Help Kaise Karte Hain?
hi.about_intro: PathFinder-AI students ko strengths samajhne, suitable career options explore karne, aur practical learning roadmap banane mein help karta hai.
hi.offering_intro: Hamari services par ek nazar daaliye.
hi.personalized_assessments_text: Platform aapka naam, academic performance, aur interests jaise important details collect karta hai. Phir aapke interests ke hisaab se assessment questions tailor kiye jaate hain.
hi.comprehensive_analysis_text: AI aapke responses analyze karta hai, strengths aur development areas evaluate karta hai, aur different career domains ke liye potential score calculate karta hai.
hi.customized_career_insights_text: Assessment score ke basis par aapki strengths aur interests se aligned career paths recommend kiye jaate hain.
hi.ai_powered_guidance_text: AI chatbot se professions, roadmaps, skills, salary scope, aur recommendations ke baare mein real-time questions poochh sakte hain.
hi.industry_insights_text: Field-specific insights, mentoring direction, counselling support, aur resources paayen jo aapko real professional work samajhne mein help karte hain.
hi.customized_tests_text: Aptitude test aapke interests aur academic profile ke hisaab se design kiya gaya hai.
hi.personalized_guidance_text: Aapki strengths aur goals ke hisaab se personalized career advice paayen.
hi.ai_insights_text: Precise AI insights aur skill-gap analysis ke saath career choices optimize karein.
hi.cta_text: Apni unique strengths aur interests ke hisaab se customized career recommendations paayen.
hi.contact_text: Career counselling, mentorship resources, project support, ya platform questions ke liye contact karein.
hi.message_placeholder: Batayein aapko kis career help ki zarurat hai
hi.contact_notice: Thank you. Demo ke liye aapka message receive ho gaya hai.
hi.optional_password: Current password rakhne ke liye blank chhodein
hi.products_title: Aapke next step ke liye digital career resources.
hi.products_text: Roadmap packs, resume templates, interview kits, aur career clarity resources buy karein.
hi.you_may_like: Aapko yeh bhi pasand aa sakta hai
hi.demo_payment_note: Is project version mein demo checkout hai, real money charge nahi hota.

hi.question: Question
